parameters.query:
WITH revoked AS (
  UPDATE client_access_tokens
     SET revoked_at = now(),
         notes = COALESCE(notes,'') || ' [auto-revoked: inactive>60d]'
   WHERE revoked_at IS NULL
     AND (
       (last_used_at IS NULL AND issued_at < now() - INTERVAL '60 days') OR
       (last_used_at IS NOT NULL AND last_used_at < now() - INTERVAL '60 days')
     )
  RETURNING id, project_id, purpose, issued_at, last_used_at
), expired AS (
  UPDATE client_access_tokens
     SET revoked_at = now(),
         notes = COALESCE(notes,'') || ' [auto-revoked: expired]'
   WHERE revoked_at IS NULL
     AND expires_at IS NOT NULL
     AND expires_at < now() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  RETURNING id, project_id, purpose, expires_at
), event AS (
  INSERT INTO security_events (event_type, severity, source_ip, endpoint, resource_type, description, details)
  SELECT 'token_revoked', 'info', 'cron', 'cron_inactive_token_cleanup', 'token', 'Auto-revocados ' || ((SELECT count(*) FROM revoked) + (SELECT count(*) FROM expired)) || ' tokens',
         jsonb_build_object('inactive_revoked', (SELECT count(*) FROM revoked), 'expired_revoked', (SELECT count(*) FROM expired))
  WHERE (SELECT count(*) FROM revoked) + (SELECT count(*) FROM expired) > 0
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT json_build_object(
  'inactive_count', (SELECT count(*) FROM revoked),
  'expired_count', (SELECT count(*) FROM expired),
  'event_logged', EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM event)
) AS report;
